name: Abdullah Saeed Khodari
title: Backend Engineer
summary: Backend Engineer with extensive experience designing scalable microservices and RESTful APIs using Node.js, Express, and TypeScript. Proficient in database optimization with PostgreSQL, MySQL, and MongoDB. Adept at integrating complex third-party services (Stripe, Fawry, OpenAI) and deploying containerized applications using Docker and AWS.

experience.brief: Architecting robust microservices, optimizing relational databases, and integrating complex third-party APIs (Stripe, OpenAI) for high-traffic platforms.
Engineered the core Node.js/MongoDB backend infrastructure, managing game state data, AWS S3 asset delivery, and payment gateway integrations.

projects.name: Loyalla - Multi-Tenant SaaS Platform | OrderKing Egypt
bullets: Architected a scalable 4-tier multi-tenant SaaS infrastructure (Agencies > Tenants > Branches > Consumers) using Node.js, Express, and Drizzle ORM.
Engineered a resilient FinTech core integrating Stripe and Fawry, featuring automated subscription mirroring, multi-currency billing, and localized tax compliance (VAT).
Developed an automated PDF and QR generation pipeline using PDFKit for branded multi-currency invoicing and RKSV-compliant financial reporting.
Developed a distributed background task system using pg-boss to orchestrate high-volume asynchronous marketing campaigns and automated system maintenance.
Implemented an enterprise-grade security layer featuring Supabase Vault for secret management and a programmatically generated GDPR data portability engine.
Architected an interactive Developer Portal with automated API documentation and environment-aware code samples to streamline third-party POS integrations.
Developed an enterprise-grade administrative dashboard using React, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS, maintaining a type-safe component library for high-scale multi-tenant management.
Built a global Internationalization (i18n) framework supporting LTR/RTL dashboard interfaces (EN, DE, TR, AR) with context-aware UI feedback loops.
Implemented a sophisticated geospatial layer using React-Leaflet, allowing admins to visualize branch distribution and perform precision location-picking via custom map interactions.
Engineered advanced analytics dashboards using Chart.js, featuring dynamic date-range filtering, localized number formatting (MENA/EU), and responsive time-series visualization.

projects.name: Enterprise ERP & POS Platform | OrderKing Egypt
bullets: Architected a scalable Node.js and Express REST API powering a comprehensive multi-country ERP and POS platform.
Designed and optimized a complex MySQL database schema to handle granular inventory tracking, dynamic currency mapping, and transaction histories.
Engineered an automated Product Stock Location (PSL) engine with CRON jobs that evaluate real-time stock against minimum thresholds, automatically dispatching WebSocket alerts for reordering.
Implemented multi-platform Push Notifications using Firebase Admin (FCM) for Android and direct APNs for iOS to alert field agents of emergency support tickets and task updates.
Developed automated PDF and QR code generation using 'pdfkit' and 'qrcode' to create scannable labels for physical warehouse management and RKSV compliance.
Built the backend infrastructure for 'QuickPlate' self-ordering tablets, including secure device registration, heartbeat monitoring, and subscription lifecycles.
Created robust file upload and digital asset management systems using 'multer' with strict validation and isolated storage rules.

projects.name: WingoLand - Game-Based Learning Platform | WingoLand
bullets: Engineered the backend architecture using Node.js, Express, and MongoDB to manage dynamic game data and user state.
Implemented complex monetization flows including Apple In-App Purchases, Tap payments gateway, and Tabby split payments.
Managed static asset delivery and optimization via AWS S3 to ensure fast load times across global regions.

projects.name: Kafka Event Handler – Microservice
bullets: Built a fault-tolerant event streaming service using Apache Kafka and Node.js.
Implemented producer/consumer patterns to decouple services and ensure data consistency.
Containerized the entire stack using Docker for consistent local and production environments.

projects.name: QR Auth System
bullets: Developed a secure authentication backend using JWT and bcrypt.
Implemented real-time socket connections for instant QR code validation.
Designed a schema-driven API using Zod for strict input validation.

projects.name: EduBase API
bullets: Engineered a course management API with role-based access control (RBAC).
Integrated Paymob payment gateway and automated email receipts using Nodemailer.

education.details: Intensive hands-on training focusing on building full-stack applications using MongoDB, Express.js, React.js, Angular, and Node.js.

education.degree: Bachelor's in Computer and Systems Engineering
education.details: Grade: Very good. Graduation project: Backend for Game-based learning platform.
